name: Instagram Warm-up
description: Simulates natural Instagram browsing with randomized engagement targets per run. Comment steps navigate the search results grid so each comment lands on a different user's reel.

params.nicheKeywords: Search terms for the Explore tab (e.g. 'fitness motivation')
params.commentPrompt: Persona/style instruction for comments (e.g. 'You are a fitness enthusiast. Write a 5-6 word funny supportive reply')
params.commentCount: Number of unique reels to comment on — duplicate the comment step that many times

steps.goal: Open Instagram. Dismiss popups. Once on Home feed, you are done.
Search for: {{nicheKeywords}}. Scroll results, tap something, press Back. Return Home. Done.
Watch stories, like {{likeStories}}. If no stories, you are done.
Scroll feed. Like {{likePosts}} posts. After {{scrollPosts}} posts, done.
Watch reels, linger on some (use wait). Like {{likeReels}}. After {{watchReels}} reels, done.

Go to Search/Explore tab. Search for '{{nicheKeywords}}'. Tap the Reels filter to show only reels. Tap the 1st reel to open it. Tap the comment button. {{commentPrompt}}. Post exactly ONE comment and tap Post. After posting, press Back to close comments, then press Back to return to the search results grid. Stop immediately — do NOT open or comment on any other reels. Done.

You are on the search results grid showing reels. Scroll down to see new results. Tap a reel that looks different from previous ones. Tap the comment button. {{commentPrompt}}. Post exactly ONE comment and tap Post. After posting, press Back to close comments, then press Back to return to the search results grid. Stop immediately — do NOT open or comment on any other reels. Done.
